title: Priority Scheme - First-Timer (Parents & Married Couples), FT(PMC) Category
text:
Priority Scheme - First-Timer (Parents & Married Couples), FT(PMC) Category - SupportGoWhere
Priority Scheme - First-Timer (Parents & Married Couples), FT(PMC) Category
Share link
Provides an extra ballot chance when applying for Build-To-Order (BTO) or Sale of Balance (SBF) flats and first priority for flats set aside under the Family and Parenthood Priority Scheme (FPPS).
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Additional ballot chance for BTO/SBF exercises, totalling 3 chances for FT(PMC) applicants
First priority for applicants applying for 4-room or smaller BTO flats in non-mature estates under FPPS
Collapse all sections
About this support

1 additional ballot chance, on top of the 2 provided to First-Timer Families, when applying for BTO or SBF flats

Receive first priority for flats set aside under the Family and Parenthood Priority Scheme (FPPS) when applying for a 4-room or smaller BTO flat in non-mature estates

Who is this for?

Applicants must meet all the following criteria:

Families must have a Singapore Citizen child aged 18 and below or a married couple aged 40 and below (includes married couples who are expecting and have a doctor’s certification of the pregnancy)

Never owned or sold a residential property, including a HDB flat

Did not have a chance to book a BTO or SBF flat in the past five years prior to their flat application

How to apply?

Obtain a HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal and apply for a flat during BTO or SBF exercises

HDB will assess your eligibility for the FT (PMC) after you have submitted your flat application

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
